steps.title: Identify the example pattern
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim: Spartans kept their laconic wit even in danger. The second sentence gives a specific incident in which they reply to Philip II's threat with one concise word.

steps.title: Reject contrast transitions
steps.content: A signals correction, but the anecdote supports the first sentence. B signals restatement, not a new incident. C signals concession or contrast, which the logic does not require. The answer is D.
